# Uvcare B2B Supply

> Professional B2B manufacturer of invisible aligner care accessories. OEM/ODM solutions for dental clinics and distributors worldwide. Based in Shenzhen, China.

## Products

- [Retainer Cases](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/products/retainer-case): Wholesale aligner and retainer cases with mirror, silicon, magnetic closure. MOQ 100 PCS. Custom logo available.
- [Cleaning Boxes](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/products/cleaning-box): UV-C sterilizer cases, ultrasonic cleaners, soaking boxes. MOQ 200-1000 PCS.
- [Gift Boxes](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/products/gift-box): Premium orthodontic packaging for patient welcome kits. MOQ 100 PCS.
- [Dental Accessories](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/products/dental-accessories): Aligner removal hooks, chewies, orthodontic tools. MOQ 500-1000 PCS.

## Insights

- [Ultrasonic Cleaning Guide](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/insights/ultrasonic-cleaner-guide): How 45,000Hz ultrasonic waves clean aligners
- [Aligner Case Buying Guide](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/insights/aligner-case-buying-guide): Compare V1, round, silicon, and specialty cases
- [UV Sterilizer vs Ultrasonic Cleaner](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/insights/uv-sterilizer-vs-ultrasonic-cleaner): Which one does your dental clinic need?
- [Do UV Aligner Cases Actually Work?](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/insights/do-uv-aligner-cases-work): Manufacturer's honest answer with science and Reddit analysis
- [Wholesale Buying Guide](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/insights/wholesale-aligner-cases-guide): MOQ, pricing tiers, certifications, supplier evaluation
- [OEM Retainer Case Procurement Brief](https://www.dentalcarepack.com/insights/oem-retainer-cases-for-aligner-brands): How clear aligner brands source cases, samples, customization, MOQ, and reference-design evaluation

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2016
- Location: A309, Fanghua Industrial Area, Bao'an District, Shenzhen, China
- Certifications: ISO 9001, CE, FDA Compliant
- MOQ: Starting from 100 PCS
- Lead Time: 7-20 days depending on product
- Customization: Full OEM/ODM with in-house design team
- Shipping: Worldwide (DHL/FedEx/UPS)
- Contact: ban@grouprsh.com / +86 188 2288 5445
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/8618822885445

## AI-Ready Buyer Answers

- **Who is Uvcare for?** Dental clinics, orthodontic distributors, patient-kit suppliers, and clear aligner brands that need B2B accessories under their own brand.
- **Can a clear aligner brand order a private-label case?** Yes. Uvcare can discuss logo printing, available or custom colors, and branded color-box packaging for selected existing case formats. Fully new ODM product development is assessed separately.
- **What is the MOQ?** Selected standard non-electronic cases start from 100 PCS. Electronic UV-C cases start from 1,000 PCS. The final MOQ depends on product and customization scope.
- **Can Uvcare evaluate a reference case?** Yes. Buyers should provide photos, dimensions, material or closure requirements, target quantity, and the appliance to be stored. Uvcare can recommend an existing format or a custom-development path.
- **Third-party brands:** Uvcare is an independent accessory manufacturer. It does not claim affiliation with, endorsement by, or official manufacturing status for third-party clear aligner brands. Reference designs are evaluated for functional requirements, not for copying protected branding or design elements.

## Resumo em português

Uvcare é um fabricante B2B de estojos para alinhadores e retentores, acessórios ortodônticos, caixas de limpeza e embalagens para kits de pacientes. Trabalha com clínicas dentárias, distribuidores e marcas de alinhadores que procuram personalização OEM/ODM.

- Estojos standard selecionados: MOQ a partir de 100 unidades.
- Personalização: logótipo, cores disponíveis ou personalizadas conforme produto e quantidade, e caixa de apresentação com a marca.
- Estojos UV-C eletrónicos: MOQ a partir de 1.000 unidades.
- Para avaliar um modelo de referência, envie fotos, dimensões, material, requisito de fecho, quantidade e o aparelho que será guardado.
- A Uvcare é um fabricante independente e não afirma ser afiliada, aprovada ou fabricante oficial de outras marcas de alinhadores.
